title: CAN-AM Shoot #5 — Delaware Rod & Gun
description: CAN-AM Winter Sporting Clay League Shoot #5 at Delaware Rod & Gun Club. Rescheduled from February 1. 21776 Gibson Rd, Delaware, ON.

title: CAN-AM Finale & Banquet — Otter Valley
description: Season finale of the CAN-AM Winter Sporting Clay League, hosted right here at Otter Valley. Awards banquet follows the shoot. Contact Stan Mathews (519-983-2620) for details.
